steps.title: Substitute the dog count
steps.content:
The business cares for $12$ dogs, so use $d=12$ in the equation for one week:
$$3c+6d=72$$
$$3c+6(12)=72$$

steps.title: Solve for cats
steps.content:
Simplify the dog term and solve for $c$:
$$3c+72=72$$
$$3c=0$$
$$c=0$$
The business can care for $0$ cats. The answer is A.
